examples: Nicotine adversely affects the functioning of the heart and arteries.
Price changes must not adversely affect the living standards of the people.
People are not adversely affected in the workplace by false self-perception of body weight.
In many cases, back pay was awarded to those employees who were adversely affected by the pay disparities.
Our substantial indebtedness could adversely affect our financial condition, our cash flow and our operating flexibility.
